name: Rogz Lekka Flat Mat Mediumgey/Navy
shortDescription: Elevate your pet's lounging experience with the ROGZ Lekka Flat Mat. Designed for both style and comfort, this mat features a sleek medium grey and navy color combination that seamlessly blends with any decor. Measurements: L x W x H 83 x 56 x 2.5 CM
description: Rogz Lekka Flat Mats are designed to be taken on any adventure or used at home as it is versatile and lightweight. The mat can easily be rolled up making it ideal for hiking and camping. It has a durable canvas base which is perfect for outdoor use and is easy to clean. The soft, plush sherpa top provides a comfortable spot for your dog to rest. On hotter days, the mat can be flipped allowing your dog to rest on the canvas side. It is made with 100% recycled P.E.T. filler. The bed features a non-skid base that prevents it from sliding on smooth surfaces. Product Highlights: Stylish Design: The contemporary medium grey and navy color scheme offers a modern touch that complements a variety of home interiors. Comfortable Cushioning: Made with high-quality materials, the Lekka Flat Mat provides a soft, cushioned surface for your pet to relax on. Durable Construction: Built to withstand everyday use, this mat is crafted from durable fabrics that are resistant to wear and tear. Easy Maintenance: The mat is machine washable, making it simple to keep clean and fresh for your pet. Versatile Use: Ideal for use in crates, on the floor, or as a travel mat, this flat mat offers versatile comfort wherever your pet goes. Give your pet the gift of a stylish and comfortable resting spot with the ROGZ Lekka Flat Mat. Perfect for pets who love to lounge in style!
